metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for Apify Actors via mcpc CLI

plugins.name: apify-mcpc
plugins.description: Finds, evaluates, and runs Apify Actors using the mcpc CLI. Searches Apify Store, compares Actors by stats and ratings, reads input schemas, runs Actors, and retrieves results. Covers 8 marketing intelligence use cases plus multi-actor workflow patterns with domain-specific guidance.
